body:
Please create a file named `goodbye.txt` in the project root directory.

The file should contain:
- A farewell message: "Goodbye, World!"
- Current timestamp
- A note: "Testing automation with proper test validation"

This tests that the automation system properly validates tests and formatting before creating PRs.

labels.name: approved
labels.description: Approved by maintainer for automated implementation

title: Add goodbye.txt file
